name: Goblin Bruiser
description: A stocky goblin with crude armor and a heavy club. It charges recklessly.

name: Skeleton Guard
description: A rattling skeleton clad in rusted armor, guarding the stairwell.

name: Cult Acolyte
description: A robed figure whispering strange incantations, eyes glowing faintly.

name: Rat Swarm
description: A writhing mass of tower rats that overwhelms with numbers.

name: Iron Sentinel
description: A slow-moving construct of rusted iron plates. It strikes with heavy force.
